description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a textured black grip at the lower end for improved handling. The head of the axe is painted a vivid red with a blackened cutting edge, giving it a striking and utilitarian appearance. The blade is broad and wedge-shaped, designed for splitting or chopping, with a flat poll on the opposite side for striking. The handle appears to be securely fitted into the axe head, likely using a traditional wedged mounting style. The overall finish is matte with some visible wear, suggesting it is a practical tool rather than decorative. No visible brand markings or labels are present on the axe.
description: A full-sized axe with a red and black head, broad wedge blade, and a curved wooden handle with a black grip. The tool is robust and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty chopping or splitting.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the rectangular cross-section of the head and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the side, clearly displaying the red and black wedge-shaped blade and the full curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the bottom, highlighting the black grip and the straight alignment of the handle with the head.
description_view_3: The opposite side view of the axe, showing the other profile of the blade and the handle's curvature.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a black rubberized grip, oval cross-section, ergonomic for two-handed use.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad wedge-shaped blade with a flat poll, red painted body, and blackened cutting edge.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle fitted through the axe head.
